text.title: pytest Patterns
text.summary: conftest fixtures, factory fixtures, mocking with patch, parametrize for edge cases, and Django DB integration tests.

example.code:
import pytest from apps.users.validators import validate_email
@pytest.mark.parametrize("email,expected", [ ("user@example.com", True), ("user.name@example.co.uk", True), ("invalid", False), ("@example.com", False), ("", False), ]) def test_validate_email(email: str, expected: bool) -> None: assert validate_email(email) == expected
